violations.text: The front door to the outside, located in the dining area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2025

Observed condensation line of walk-in refrigeration lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2025

The following areas throughout the establishment were lacking proper air gaps: 1) Condensate line of walk-in refrigeration units 2) Condensate line of ice machine 3) Drain lines of soda machine 4) Drain lines of custard machine New Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2024
